components.name: Button
components.summary: Capsule-shaped actions with a restrained Apple-inspired hierarchy.

components.name: Card
components.summary: Quiet containers defined by border and spacing, not by decoration.

components.name: Input
components.summary: Simple rounded inputs with readable placeholder contrast and visible focus.

components.name: Navigation
components.summary: Apple-store-like navigation with black top bar and restrained secondary rails.

components.name: Product Grid
components.summary: Four-column merchandising matrix with editorial spacing and measured CTA rhythm.

components.name: Comparison Table
components.summary: Model comparison cards that translate technical choices into calm visual structure.

crossComponentPatterns: Whitespace carries hierarchy more than separators or color blocks.
Rounded-full actions and large radii soften otherwise minimal surfaces.
Copy stays concise and often uses editorial commerce phrasing.
Accent color is concentrated in CTA moments rather than background coverage.
Photography-first layouts keep the UI deferential to content.
